caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a dark vest with ornate embroidery, and a red necklace, stands behind a podium and speaks into a microphone. He is positioned in front of a wall with light-colored horizontal blinds. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, including one person with white hair and another with long brown hair. The person with brown hair wears a purple garment featuring the white text "ORCA" on the back. The man remains in a similar position throughout the scene, though his facial expressions and hand gestures shift slightly as he continues to speak. A guitar is partially visible, resting on a stand or held by the man behind the podium. The camera remains stationary, capturing the man's upper body and the audience's silhouettes in a medium shot.
